channel.description: My personal corner of the internet.

item.title: First!
item.dc:creator: Sebastian Montero
item.description: This is my first entry to my new blog. I decided to create a blog to start writing more often about anything that I find interesting. This could be books, movies, papers, art, music etc etc etc. My idea is that this will be a personal outlet to transmit information and at the same time a way for me to preserve thoughts and ideas.
